title: Day 10 Lesson 2 - Video Repetition 1
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these three sentences:  

Sentence 1 - りょう に いたりあ の がくせい が います か。 (ryoo ni itaria no gakusei ga imas ka) = Are there any Italian students in the dormitory?

Sentence 2 - はい、います。 (hai imas) = Yes, there are

Sentence 2 -いいえ、いません。 (iie imasen) = No, there aren't.

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard. Keep practising until you can repeat perfectly!
